cause_analysis.narrative: Shamsi Beauty & Hair Salon churned on 2026-03-30 after 383 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-14 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "angry". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 30 day(s) before churn via email. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
